app.name: Beat'Em All
app.tagline: The home of competitive gaming in the GCC.

home.subtitle: Form a team. Find opponents nearby. Meet at a venue. Compete for real.
home.signedOutHint: No account yet? Phone number is all you need.

hero.incompleteTitle: One more step to start playing.
hero.incompleteBody: Pick the games you compete in and we'll surface teams, tournaments, and venues that match.
hero.idleBody: Pick a fight or jump into a tournament — both are one tap away.

recommendedTeams.title: Recommended teams
recommendedTeams.empty: No teams nearby playing {game} yet. Widen your radius or add another game in settings.

quickActions.challengeCaption: Search teams nearby and send a challenge.
quickActions.venuesCaption: Verified gaming cafés across the GCC.

tournaments.title: Tournaments for you
tournaments.empty: No tournaments matching your games yet. KEC's next sanctioned event will show up here.

venues.title: Nearby venues
venues.empty: No verified venues near you yet. We're rolling out venue partners across Kuwait first.

activity.title: Recent activity
activity.soloEmptyTitle: Once you join a team, your match history will live here.
activity.activeEmptyTitle: No matches yet — your first result will appear here.

signIn.title: Welcome to the arena.
signIn.subtitle: One number. One identity. Across every team you ever play on.
signIn.termsPrefix: By continuing, you agree to our

errors.invalid_phone: That doesn't look like a valid phone number.
errors.rate_limited: Too many attempts. Try again in 15 minutes.

verify.title: Check your texts.
verify.lockoutWarning: {remaining} attempts left. After 3 failed tries, your account is locked for 15 minutes.

errors.invalid_code: That code doesn't match. Try again.
errors.expired_code: That code expired. Request a new one.
errors.rate_limited: Locked for 15 minutes after 3 failed attempts.

onboarding.title: Pick your games.
onboarding.subtitle: We'll find teams and tournaments that match. Choose at least one.
onboarding.minOneGame: Pick at least one game to continue.

profile.emptyMatches: No matches played yet. Send a challenge to be the first.
profile.emptyAchievements: Earn your first badge by completing a match.
profile.noPentagon: Play a few ranked matches to unlock your stat pentagon.

team.notFoundBody: We couldn't find that team. It may have been disbanded or never existed.

playerNotFound.title: Player not found
playerNotFound.body: We couldn't find that player profile.

venue.indexSubtitle: Authorised gaming cafés and esports centres ready to host your next match.
venue.notFoundBody: We couldn't find that venue. It may have been delisted or never existed.

tournament.indexSubtitle: Sanctioned KEC events and community cups across the GCC.
tournament.emptyList: No tournaments are scheduled right now.
